_README: Apply at PROJECT level (.claude/settings.json), not global (~/.claude/settings.json). Database rules (*.sqlite, *.db) will break tools that read SQLite (session memory, local search, WhatsApp MCP). Remove those lines if you use such tools.
_TOKEN_NOTE: Deny rules save tokens ONLY when Claude never tries the path (secrets, node_modules, build output). If you deny a path Claude actively wants, each blocked attempt comes back as feedback that accumulates in the conversation and is re-sent every turn, which COSTS tokens. Prefer narrow paths over broad globs: Read(./logs/**) over Read(./**/*.log). If Claude keeps hitting 'permission denied' on the same path, narrow or remove that rule.
_CAUTION_database_rules: Only add these if no tools need database access: Read(./**/*.sqlite), Read(./**/*.db)
